summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Night Audit automatic scheduling feature - Backend 13/13 tests PASSED, Frontend all tests PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for schedule components
DialogDescription is now properly included in both Schedule and Run dialogs (accessibility improvement from previous iteration)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Night Audit scheduling feature fully tested and working. Schedule was disabled after testing to prevent auto-runs. All 3 new endpoints (GET/PUT /api/night-audit/schedule, GET /api/night-audit/schedule/status) working correctly.

endpoints_tested: PUT /api/night-audit/schedule - enables/disables scheduler, updates time/timezone/retry settings
GET /api/night-audit/schedule/status - returns scheduler status with recent logs

schedule_dialog_elements: data-testid='schedule-max-retries-select' - Max retries dropdown (shown when auto-retry on)
existing_features_verified: Run Audit button and dialog still working
